title: Fillmore Turk Mini Park | TS STUDIO
content: Fillmore Turk Mini Park is an existing small urban park in downtown San Francisco owned and managed by the San Francisco Rec & Parks Department since 1978 adjacent to a decommissioned Muni Sub-Station. Through a community-driven design process, TS Studio developed a park design vision based on the needs of existing users of the park in the community. ​Fillmore Turk Mini Park sits adjacent the historical muni-substation - one of largest substations in San Francisco that fed power to streetcars in the western half of the City until 1978 when it was declared a landmark. Inspired by the adjacent landmark, site and the Fillmore community, a series of precast Elliptical Tourqued Planters intend to harness and to honor energetic history and engaging attitude. In 2016 Fillmore Turk Mini-Park was awarded the SF Recreation and Parks Community Opportunity Fund grant, and construction started in the winter of 2022 and is expected to be completed in fall 2023. CLIENT: San Francisco Recreation and Park Department.

title: Fillmore & Turk Mini Park - San Francisco - MapQuest
content: This small park offers a peaceful retreat with benches, lush greenery, and a playground for children, making it a perfect spot for families and locals to relax.
